title: This 25-Year-Old Built a 2-Year Moat Nobody Can Bet Against | Corgi, Nico Laqua & Emily Yuan
summary: Nico Laqua and Emily Yuan, co-founders of Corgi, rebuilt the insurance industry from scratch rather than modernizing legacy carriers, securing a $108M Series A. The company operates on a principle of pursuing the most ambitious version of any idea, creating a durable competitive moat through two years of regulatory challenges and relentless execution.
